name: OpenClaw Easy Pruning
description: Rule-based session pruning for any model: soft/hard/detail pruning before agent run, in-memory only.

pruning_threshold.description: Trigger pruning when estimated context tokens reaches this value

trigger_every_n_tokens.description: Minimum estimated token growth since last pruning trigger

keep_recent_tokens.description: Always preserve this many most-recent tokens

keep_recent_messages.description: Always preserve this many most-recent messages

soft_threshold.description: Soft mode start. <1 = ratio, >=1 = absolute token position

hard_threshold.description: Hard mode start. <1 = ratio, >=1 = absolute token position

detail_threshold.description: Detail mode start. <1 = ratio, >=1 = absolute token position

detail_summary_model.description: Optional model name for model_summary mode

detail_summary_max_chars.description: Maximum summary chars in model_summary mode

debug_pruning_io.description: Log per-message pruning debug entries with before/after token estimates

debug_summary_io.description: Log model-summary prompt/output previews and candidate failures

debug_preview_chars.description: Preview character limit for debug logs

detail_placeholder.default: [Detailed execution context pruned to save tokens]

compaction_threshold_hint.description: Optional warning-only hint: pruning_threshold should be lower than this value

pruning_threshold.label: Pruning Threshold
pruning_threshold.help: Start pruning when context reaches this estimated token count

soft_threshold.label: Soft Threshold
soft_threshold.help: <1 for ratio (0~1), >=1 for absolute token position

hard_threshold.label: Hard Threshold
hard_threshold.help: <1 for ratio (0~1), >=1 for absolute token position

detail_threshold.label: Detail Threshold
detail_threshold.help: <1 for ratio (0~1), >=1 for absolute token position

debug_summary_io.label: Debug Summary I/O
debug_summary_io.help: Enable model summary prompt/output preview logs
